name: klipp
description: KLIPP — on-chain identity: soulbound cards, verified credentials, and tokenized equity

pnpm.comment: Dedupe viem to one version. Privy smart-wallets + permissionless pull viem 2.52.0; without this the app resolved a second copy (2.51.2) and the nominally-distinct Chain/Account types broke the smart-wallet sendTransaction call.
